plugins.name: cogni-claims
plugins.description: Claim verification and management system. Verifies sourced claims against cited URLs, detects deviations, and guides users through resolution.

plugins.name: cogni-narrative
plugins.description: Story arc-driven narrative transformation. Transforms research syntheses and structured content into compelling executive narratives using 6 story arc frameworks including TIPS-native trend panorama. Includes narrative review scoring and derivative format adaptation.

plugins.name: cogni-copywriting
plugins.description: Professional copywriting toolkit providing document polishing with messaging frameworks (BLUF, Pyramid, SCQA, STAR, PSB, FAB), stakeholder review via parallel persona Q&A, readability optimization, sales enhancement (Power Positions), and multi-language support.

plugins.name: cogni-workspace
plugins.description: Lean workspace orchestrator for insight-wave marketplace plugins. Manages shared foundation (env vars, settings), theme management, theme picker, plugin discovery, workspace health, and Obsidian vault integration.

plugins.name: cogni-trends
plugins.description: Strategic trend scouting and reporting pipeline. Combines the Smarter Service Trendradar (4-dimension structure) with the TIPS content framework (Trends, Implications, Possibilities, Solutions) for industry trend analysis. Bilingual support (EN/DE).

plugins.name: cogni-portfolio
plugins.description: Portfolio messaging and proposition planning for SMEs using IS/DOES/MEANS framework. Features are market-independent (IS). Advantages (DOES) and benefits (MEANS) are market-specific. Includes TAM/SAM/SOM targeting, competitor and customer analysis.

plugins.name: cogni-visual
plugins.description: Transform polished narratives into visual deliverables — presentation briefs, slide decks, big picture journey maps, scrollable web narratives, poster storyboards, and visual assets. Supports Excalidraw, Pencil MCP, and PPTX rendering.

plugins.name: cogni-help
plugins.description: Central help hub for the insight-wave ecosystem. Interactive courses (11-course curriculum), plugin discovery, cross-plugin workflow guides, troubleshooting, quick-reference cheatsheets, and GitHub issue filing.

plugins.name: cogni-marketing
plugins.description: B2B marketing content engine bridging cogni-trends investment themes (Handlungsfelder) and cogni-portfolio propositions into channel-ready content. Supports thought leadership, demand generation, lead generation, sales enablement, and ABM across markets with configurable brand voice. Bilingual DE/EN.

plugins.name: cogni-research
plugins.description: Multi-agent research report generator. STORM-inspired editorial workflow with parallel web research, claims-verified review loops, and three report types (basic, detailed, deep). Integrates with cogni-claims for source verification.

plugins.name: cogni-sales
plugins.description: B2B sales pitch generation using Corporate Visions Why Change methodology. Creates sales presentations and proposals for named customers (deal-specific) or market segments (reusable). Builds on cogni-portfolio data with optional TIPS strategic enrichment. Bilingual DE/EN.

plugins.name: cogni-consulting
plugins.description: Double Diamond consulting orchestrator. Guides engagements through Discover, Define, Develop, Deliver phases by dispatching to insight-wave plugins (research, trends, portfolio, claims) at the right moment. Vision-first, method-aware, phase-gated. Includes Lean Canvas authoring and multi-persona stress testing via the business-model-hypothesis vision class.
